name: engineering-blog
description: Blog about industrial engineering, systems engineering, and data science

scripts.build:production: NODE_ENV=production node build.js && bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.build:test: NODE_ENV=test node build.js && JEKYLL_ENV=test bundle exec jekyll build --drafts --future
scripts.dev: npm run build && bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload
scripts.optimize:assets: npm run minify && npm run gzip
scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run test:js && npm run test:css
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.audit:performance: npm run build && npx lighthouse http://localhost:4000 --output=json --output-path=./lighthouse-report.json
scripts.analyze:size: npm run build && du -sh _site/ && find _site/ -name '*.js' -exec wc -c {} + | sort -n

author: DominicusIn
